description: Wind Power LLC received an urgent order from Apex Corp for 10 'Industrial Solar Inverter' units. We don't have these in stock, so you must arrange a drop shipment directly from the manufacturer, Global Solar Supply. Your job is to: 1. Create a Sales Order for Apex Corp for 10 units of 'Industrial Solar Inverter' at $1500 each, configuring the item row to be 'Delivered by Supplier' and setting the supplier to 'Global Solar Supply'. 2. Create the linked Purchase Order to Global Solar Supply from the Sales Order (rate $1000 each). 3. Create the Delivery Note directly from the Purchase Order to record the drop ship delivery. Log into ERPNext at http://localhost:8080 with credentials Administrator / admin.
